programmes.show_description: Sammies And Stew. Guy Fieri digs into super sandwiches and stew! On his travels he visits a café with a native Kenyan cooking up fresh fish and Caribbean goat stew. S18, Ep6
All Things New York. Guy Fieri gets a taste of NYC. In Eureka, CA, a Bronx-bred pizza maker brings Neapolitan-style pies. In Queens, a filmmaker-turned-chef serves atomic fireballs. S19, Ep2
Kickin' It In Key West. Guy Fieri visits eateries in Key West, FLA, from a funky little shack serving up New England seafood to a tiny food cart cranking out Asian-Caribbean dishes. S19, Ep6
Island Flavor. Guy Fieri cruises round Hawaii for a taste of Oahu. A tiny cafe serves up modern twists on Hawaiian classics and an authentic Hawaiian drive-in cranks out fresh fish. S19, Ep10
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Big Time Bites. In New York's East Village, Guy Fieri visits the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger. In Eureka, CA a popular hangout serves roasted oysters. S19, Ep3
From Meatballs To Lollipops. Guy Fieri gets into a festival of flavours. In Salt Lake City, a New Jersey native serves up Italian family recipes like the huge ten-ounce meatball! S19, Ep7
Grillin', Chillin', Huli Huli. Guy Fieri checks out unique grills on the mainland and beyond. On the menu - classic Americana with a twist, unusual tacos and huli huli chicken. S19, Ep11
Servin' Up San Francisco. Guy Fieri cruises the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. He visits an NY-style deli and a food truck park serving Asian-fusion. S18, Ep3
Cincinnati. Adam head to Cincinnati, Ohio where he devours some grilled cheese sandwiches. Later, he guides namesake Adam through Reuben Challenge at Izzy's, but will he succeed? S1, Ep20
Omaha. Adam heads to Omaha, Nebraska where he samples the famous Godfather sandwich at Amato's Café. Later he guides Matt through the Pig Wing Challenge, but will he succeed? S1, Ep22
Charlotte. Adam tastes a four-tier cheeseburger and golden fried chicken in Charlotte. Plus, a college freshman takes on the Big Eats Challenge, 25 pulled pork sliders and fries! S2, Ep1
Milwaukee, WI. Casey Webb travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken. S1, Ep1
Charleston, SC. Casey Webb heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. In the Belt Buster Challenge, he must devour a two-pound burger and a huge order of tater tots. S1, Ep3
Nascar. Adam heads to Rochester, New York via a NASCAR race. Later, he guides driver Joey Logano through the Atomic Bomb Challenge, involving a three-pound cheeseburger. S1, Ep21
Oahu. Adam heads to Oahu, where he tries a Chicago style frank with a Hawaiian twist. Later, he guides Lauren through The Moose Omelette Challenge, but will she succeed? S1, Ep24
Jackson. Adam tries fall-off-the-bone BBQ and a comfort food buffet in Jackson. He also coaches a vegetarian through a three-patty hamburger and fries called the Whammy Challenge. S2, Ep2
New York, NY. Casey is in New York City for the best in big city eats. In one challenge, he faces a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings. S1, Ep2
Sleepy Hollow, NY. Casey Webb visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive Headless Horseman Burger and takes on the Dawg House Challenge. S1, Ep4
Oxford. In Oxford, James is joined by top chef Monica Galetti, who discovers the delights of an organic local distiller. Plus, James visits Raymond Blanc. S1, Ep7
South Wales. James is in South Wales, accompanied by his mate, top chef Stephen Terry. They discover award-winning Welsh wine and organic Welsh chocolate. S1, Ep8
Britain's best amateur bakers compete in the iconic white tent! Who will struggle under pressure and who will impress judges, Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith? S12, Ep5
Britain's best amateur bakers compete in the iconic white tent! Who will struggle under pressure and who will impress judges, Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith? S12, Ep6
Britain's best amateur bakers compete in the iconic white tent! Who will struggle under pressure and who will impress judges, Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith? S12, Ep7
Britain's best amateur bakers compete in the iconic white tent! Who will struggle under pressure and who will impress judges, Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith? S12, Ep8
Yorkshire Pudding. Adam ticks 'Yorkshire Pudding in Yorkshire' off his foodie bucket list. Then, he tries Yorkshire parkin, local rabbit, and a Yorkshire tea-inspired dessert. S1, Ep1
Sandwich. Adam heads to Kent to try a very special sandwich in Sandwich. There, he also tries Whitstable oysters, traditional fish and chips, and a new baked sensation, the cruffin. S1, Ep2
Jamie cooks up his version of steak and onion sandwich and shows his way to cook osso buco. Plus, he makes a sticky toffee pudding with his mum. S1, Ep3
Jamie serves up three comfort food classics: chicken kiev, shepherd's pie and spaghetti alle vongole with a non-traditional pink twist. S1, Ep4
Oxford. In Oxford, James is joined by top chef Monica Galetti, who discovers the delights of an organic local distiller. Plus, James visits Raymond Blanc. S1, Ep7
South Wales. James is in South Wales, accompanied by his mate, top chef Stephen Terry. They discover award-winning Welsh wine and organic Welsh chocolate. S1, Ep8
Keepin' It Real. In Miami, Guy visits the Asian fusion spot giving Brussels sprouts a makeover. In Eureka, CA, a soul food spot serves up favourites like jerk fried chicken. S19, Ep4
Cross Country Comfort Food. Guy Fieri seeks comfort food from the slopes to the sea. In Utah, a local boy serves a gourmet chivito club and a ski lodge dishes out crispy pork belly. S19, Ep8
Righteous Bites. Guy Fieri checks out dishes on both sides of the Pacific. There are platefuls of guilty pleasures in LA and in Monterey, CA, a spot on the pier serves fresh fish. S19, Ep12
Cannoli, Fritters, And Wings. Guy Fieri revs up for a festival of flavours! He visits a Guamanian food truck serving shrimp fritters and checks out a family-run comfort food joint. S18, Ep4

Roswell, New Mexico. Casey Webb ventures to Roswell, New Mexico for a UFO-inspired Thanksgiving sandwich. Later, he takes on the undefeated 10-98 challenge! S5, Ep7
Boulder, Colorado. Casey Webb heads to Boulder, Colorado for a bourbon burger blast and campfire classic. Plus, he samples an insanely hot pizza with three layers of ghost pepper. S5, Ep8
The Peak District. The Bikers visit the stunning Peak District. They cook a traditional breakfast, spicy patties and a tasty picnic of scotch eggs, custard tarts and sweet cookies. S1, Ep7
Girls' Night In. Ree hosts a girls' night at the lodge. On the menu is a spread of canapes like citrus shrimp nachos and courgette and quinoa cakes with herby yoghurt. S22, Ep4
16-Minute Weeknight Dinners. Ree shares some of her 16-minute marvel recipes. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches with warm red cabbage and spicy stir-fry Kung Pao cauliflower. S22, Ep5
The Ultimate Burger. Jamie Oliver takes the UK's favourite cuisine to the next level. The chef shows how to make his ultimate burger with his friend, DJ BBQ. S1, Ep1
Jamie Oliver masters Bolognese ravioli. Plus, he recreates the UK's favourite dish, chicken tikka masala - with a secret ingredient. S1, Ep2
Food Adventures. Ina turns classic lobster recipe into a Deconstructed Lobster Salad. Later, she learns to make the Michelin-starred Auberge du Soleil's signature Torte Au Chocolat. S8, Ep4
Dinner In Napa. For a meal with Jeffrey Ina makes couscous and tuna salad with raspberry bars. They have dinner with Michael Chiarello who makes his great chicken with grapes. S8, Ep5
It's semi-final time and the tension is palpable as the bakers begin Patisserie Week. The semi-finalists are challenged to make signature baklava and a German schichttorte. S5, Ep9
From thousands of applicants just 12 bakers made it to the tent, and now only three remain. But who will be named the winner of the Great British Bake Off. S5, Ep10
Orkney. James Martin's culinary odyssey begins on the Orkney Islands. He whips up a beautiful scallop dish with a black pudding, apple and hazelnut butter. S1, Ep1
Lossiemouth. James Martin and Nick Nairn continue their Scottish adventure in Lossiemouth. James fulfils a childhood dream and Nick takes part in a fitness test. S1, Ep2
The Peak District. The Bikers visit the stunning Peak District. They cook a traditional breakfast, spicy patties and a tasty picnic of scotch eggs, custard tarts and sweet cookies. S1, Ep7

Food On The Go. Marcus explores the food Mallorcans eat on the go. He tries pizza-style coca de trampo, then heads to a local market for a quick, fresh lunch. S1, Ep5
Fiesta Food. Marcus discovers what Mallorcans like to eat at special occasions. He makes his version of a local favourite, almond cake, and a jug of rosé sangria. S1, Ep6
Rick Stein makes the popular steak and kidney pudding as well as poached pears with mascarpone ice cream. Plus, he visits a walled garden in East Sussex. S1, Ep5
Rick Stein forages for golden chanterelles and mushrooms in Norfolk, for a kidney breakfast dish. Plus, he tries charcuterie for the first time. S1, Ep6
Tennessee Holiday Traditions. Guy Fieri samples Tennessee's holiday traditions. In Hendersonville a barbecue joint serves up shoulder pull and a holiday ham with a fiery finish. S18, Ep11
Family Time. In Nashville a husband-wife duo hits the streets in their gourmet food truck. And, in Kansas City a sibling-owned Chinese joint shares some family traditions. S18, Ep12
